title: ASR Outdoor Portable Telescoping Collapsible Stool with Carry Handle
description:
This 6 Inch Wearable Tanto Neck Knife is the perfect tool for anyone who needs convenient yet durable cutting ability. With a Tanto style blade, the knife is not only discrete and easy to carry at all times, it is effective in multiple ways; with a dull back you can have precise firm cutting and you can have it wherever you may go. The blade itself is 3.5" in length, and the overall length is 6" including the handle. The knife comes with a necklace style thick plastic sheath that offers protection and convenience with a lock in place pin to hold the knife handle down steadily.

ASR Outdoor Portable Telescoping Collapsible Stool with Carry Handle

The perfect solution for on the go seating: meet the ASR Outdoor Portable and Collapsible Stool. Take a seat anywhere with this handy telescoping stool, designed for convenience, durability and comfort on the go. Whether you're camping, fishing, attending outdoor events, gold panning and more, this collapsible stool allows you to take a load off wherever you need it.

Key Features

  • COLLAPSIBLE STOOL: Perfect solution for on the go seating whether for camping, fishing, gold panning, attending outdoor events, picnics, tailgating and more; telescoping stool features a ten inch seat diameter, adjustable height and reaches 17.75 inches tall when fully extended
  • EASY TO USE: The telescoping stool easily expands and folds down for quick and effortless set up, providing instant relief wherever and whenever you need it; non slip, stable and secure on various surfaces
  • PORTABLE STOOL: Convenient carrying handle and strap allow for easy portability whether on your person, in a bag or backpack or in a vehicle; when fully collapsed, the collapsible stool measures 2.75 inches tall for compact storage; lightweight and easy to carry
  • SAFETY LOCK: The collapsible stool features a storage safety lock to ensure the stool stays securely locked during use, providing stability and safety; telescoping stool supports up to 275lbs when locked properly
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 2.26lbs; Extended Dimensions: 17.75 inches; Collapsed Dimensions: 10 x 10 x 2.75 inches; Color: Black

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-MO9GXNAF
  • UPC: 810131706067
  • Color: Black

The telescoping stool easily expands and folds down for quick and effortless set up. The stool features a ten inch seat diameter, adjustable height and reaches 17.75 inches tall when fully extended. In addition, the collapsible stool features a storage safety lock to ensure the stool stays securely locked during use, providing stability and safety across various surfaces.

When fully collapsed, the collapsible stool measures 2.75 inches tall, packing down to easily fit in bags, car trunks, under seats and more. The convenient carrying handle and strap allow for easy portability whether on your person, attached to a backpack or in a vehicle.

Perfect for outdoor adventures, sporting events, or just everyday convenience, this collapsible stool ensures you always have a comfortable place to sit, anywhere, anytime!<br/><br/>Note: Stool supports a maximum of 275lbs when properly locked
